name: atlas
description: Atlas is a self-configuring multi-agent coding architect. The /atlas command and a SessionStart boot load and wire the whole runtime automatically: the atlas-engine methodology (research -> theory -> test -> validate -> implement -> verify, evidence before any done claim), an 18-agent subagent squad (atlas:explorer, atlas:implementer, atlas:verifier, atlas:planner, atlas:db-prober, atlas:ui-runtime-tester, the five-agent UI/UX test swarm, and the docs curators/auditors), seven auto-loaded automation hooks, and a library of verification-gated /atlas-* launcher commands (feature, frontend, component, debug, refactor, readme, gitignore, handoff, db-audit, grafana, m365, vendor-assessment, harden, prompt, validate) that all share one neutral operating contract. Atlas integrates claude-mem and context-mode (recommend then confirm), discovers and recommends the skills/plugins/MCP a project needs, and improves itself over time: a self-improvement nudge captures lessons to memory and committed .agents/ notes so the next session starts ahead.

auvik_username.title: Auvik username
auvik_username.description: Auvik API username (the account email). Leave blank to keep the Auvik connector disabled.

auvik_api_key.title: Auvik API key
auvik_api_key.description: Auvik API key generated in Admin -> API. Leave blank to keep the Auvik connector disabled.

auvik_region.title: Auvik region
auvik_region.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (us1). Set only for a non-us1 cluster (e.g. eu1, au1).

blumira_jwt_token.title: Blumira JWT token
blumira_jwt_token.description: Pre-issued Blumira JWT bearer token (alternative to client ID/secret). Leave blank to keep the Blumira connector disabled.

blumira_client_id.title: Blumira client ID
blumira_client_id.description: Blumira OAuth2 client ID. Use this plus the secret, or supply a JWT token instead.

blumira_base_url.title: Blumira base URL
blumira_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default.

cipp_base_url.title: CIPP base URL
cipp_base_url.description: Base URL of your self-hosted CIPP API (e.g. https://cipp-api.example.com). Leave blank to keep the CIPP connector disabled.

cipp_api_key.title: CIPP API key (static Bearer token, legacy)
cipp_api_key.description: Static CIPP API bearer token. Legacy auth path; prefer the client ID/secret pair below.

cipp_tenant_id.title: Entra tenant ID
cipp_tenant_id.description: Entra (Azure AD) tenant ID used for CIPP API app auth.

cipp_client_id.title: CIPP API client ID
cipp_client_id.description: App registration client ID for the CIPP API.

cipp_client_secret.title: CIPP API client secret
cipp_client_secret.description: App registration client secret for the CIPP API.

cw_manage_company_id.title: ConnectWise Manage company ID
cw_manage_company_id.description: ConnectWise Manage company identifier. Leave blank to keep the ConnectWise Manage connector disabled.

cw_manage_public_key.title: ConnectWise Manage public key
cw_manage_public_key.description: API member public key from ConnectWise Manage.

cw_manage_private_key.title: ConnectWise Manage private key
cw_manage_private_key.description: API member private key from ConnectWise Manage.

cw_manage_base_url.title: ConnectWise Manage base URL
cw_manage_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (https://api-na.myconnectwise.net). Set for a non-NA region.

spanning_admin_email.title: Spanning admin email
spanning_admin_email.description: Spanning Backup admin account email. Leave blank to keep the Spanning connector disabled.

spanning_api_token.title: Spanning API token
spanning_api_token.description: Spanning Backup API token. Leave blank to keep the Spanning connector disabled.

spanning_platform.title: Spanning platform
spanning_platform.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (m365). Other values: gapps, salesforce.

spanning_api_url.title: Spanning API base URL
spanning_api_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default for the chosen platform.

knowbe4_api_key.title: KnowBe4 API key
knowbe4_api_key.description: KnowBe4 reporting API key. Leave blank to keep the KnowBe4 connector disabled.

knowbe4_region.title: KnowBe4 region
knowbe4_region.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (us). Other shards: eu, ca, uk, de.

knowbe4_base_url.title: KnowBe4 base URL
knowbe4_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default for the chosen region.

ninjaone_client_id.title: NinjaOne client ID
ninjaone_client_id.description: NinjaOne API application client ID. Leave blank to keep the NinjaOne connector disabled.

ninjaone_client_secret.title: NinjaOne client secret
ninjaone_client_secret.description: NinjaOne API application client secret (required for the client_credentials auth mode).

ninjaone_region.title: NinjaOne region
ninjaone_region.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (us). Other shards: eu, oc, ca.

ninjaone_auth_mode.title: NinjaOne auth mode
ninjaone_auth_mode.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (client_credentials).

ninjaone_base_url.title: NinjaOne base URL
ninjaone_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default for the chosen region.

paylocity_client_id.title: Paylocity client ID
paylocity_client_id.description: Paylocity API client ID. Leave blank to keep the Paylocity connector disabled.

paylocity_client_secret.title: Paylocity client secret
paylocity_client_secret.description: Paylocity API client secret. Leave blank to keep the Paylocity connector disabled.

paylocity_company_id.title: Paylocity company ID
paylocity_company_id.description: Optional. Default Paylocity company ID used when a tool call omits one.

paylocity_base_url.title: Paylocity base URL
paylocity_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (https://api.paylocity.com).

paylocity_sandbox.title: Paylocity sandbox
paylocity_sandbox.description: Optional. Set to true to target the Paylocity sandbox host. Leave blank for production.

threatlocker_api_key.title: ThreatLocker API key
threatlocker_api_key.description: ThreatLocker API user key. Leave blank to keep the ThreatLocker connector disabled.

threatlocker_organization_id.title: ThreatLocker organization ID
threatlocker_organization_id.description: Optional. Only set when acting on a managed child organization.

threatlocker_base_url.title: ThreatLocker base URL
threatlocker_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default shard.

vanta_client_id.title: Vanta client ID
vanta_client_id.description: Vanta OAuth2 client ID. Leave blank to keep the Vanta connector disabled.

vanta_client_secret.title: Vanta client secret
vanta_client_secret.description: Vanta OAuth2 client secret. Leave blank to keep the Vanta connector disabled.

vanta_base_url.title: Vanta base URL
vanta_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (https://api.vanta.com/v1).
